title: Enjoy diversity of string quartet
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Viridian String...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Viridian String Quartet will be performing tomorrow, Wednesday, 6 March, at the Dias Museum in Mossel Bay.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Viridian String Quartet will be performing tomorrow, Wednesday, 6 March, at the Dias Museum in Mossel Bay."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The concert is being presented by the Mossel Bay Arts Society.","html":"The concert is being presented by the Mossel Bay Arts Society."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Titled A Journey Through Space and Time, the performance will be a musical experience in which the Viridian String Quartet \"breathes soul into a diverse programme, weaving together new and old music from near and far\", a spokesperson for the arts society said.","html":"Titled A Journey Through Space and Time, the performance will be a musical experience in which the Viridian String Quartet \"breathes soul into a diverse programme, weaving together new and old music from near and far\", a spokesperson for the arts society said."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Blend"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"This captivating concert will seamlessly blend classical, jazz and film music, featuring both original string quartet compositions and innovative arrangements.","html":"\"This captivating concert will seamlessly blend classical, jazz and film music, featuring both original string quartet compositions and innovative arrangements."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"From the timeless elegance of Mozart to the evocative landscapes of Dvorák and the rhythmic allure of Bossa Nova, you will hear a harmonious fusion of diverse genres and cultural influences.\"","html":"\"From the timeless elegance of Mozart to the evocative landscapes of Dvorák and the rhythmic allure of Bossa Nova, you will hear a harmonious fusion of diverse genres and cultural influences.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Viridian String Quartet consists of Stéfan Conradie and Calvin Steyn on violins, Ingrid Robinson on viola and Cornèl Engelbrecht on the cello.","html":"The Viridian String Quartet consists of Stéfan Conradie and Calvin Steyn on violins, Ingrid Robinson on viola and Cornèl Engelbrecht on the cello."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Booking essential"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The concert starts at 19:00 and doors open at 18:00. Bookings are essential. Tickets cost R150 for members and R180 for non-members.","html":"The concert starts at 19:00 and doors open at 18:00. Bookings are essential. Tickets cost R150 for members and R180 for non-members."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Book by WhatsApping 064 963 9962. Tickets are also available for purchase at Frame of Mind in the Ocean View Mall, Bland Street, Mossel Bay.","html":"Book by WhatsApping 064 963 9962. Tickets are also available for purchase at Frame of Mind in the Ocean View Mall, Bland Street, Mossel Bay."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
